action.reasoning: Observation: The training script crashed again with exit code 139 (segmentation fault). Looking at the model implementation, there are several potential issues: 1) The edge_index and edge_weights are initialized as empty tensors but then used in GCNConv which might cause issues. 2) The reshaping logic between spatial and temporal processing might be incorrect. 3) The model architecture might be too complex for the current setup. I need to simplify the model significantly to avoid these crashes.
